constructor

        have hp' : IsSelfAdjoint p := hp.1
        simpa [hx', hp'.inner_map_left] using (inner_eq_zero_of_eq_zero (by simpa using congrArg (fun q => q x) hp.2))

      ext x
      have hp2 : p = p * p := hp.2
      have hxmem : p x ∈ LinearMap.range p := ⟨x, rfl⟩
      have : (LinearMap.range p).subtypeL (LinearMap.range p).orthogonalProjection x = ⟨p x, hxmem⟩ := by
        simpa using
          (Submodule.orthogonalProjection_eq_of_mem (K := LinearMap.range p) (x := x) hxmem)
      simp [this, LinearMap.range]

    classical
    refine ⟨?_, ?_⟩
